I’m moving $1B of my Square equity (~28% of my wealth) to #startsmall LLC to fund global COVID-19 relief. After we disarm this pandemic, the focus will shift to girl’s health and education, and UBI. It will operate transparently, all flows tracked here:

Farida Bemba Nabourema

Dec 26, 2022
France has the 4th largest gold reserve in the world. How? France holds 90% of the gold reserves of 15 African countries and pays 0% interest on what it makes from those reserves since 1945. These nations however borrow from #France from their own reserves with interest!

Edward Snowden
@Snowden
·
Dec 24, 2022
The more things change, the more they stay the same. The only solution is taking platforms out of the moderation game. The content-layer of the internet should be moved to neutral protocols. *You* should be the one who decides what you can read. Not a company. Not a government.

@mtaibbi

Dec 24, 2022
16.The government was in constant contact not just with Twitter but with virtually every major tech firm.

It's completely absurd to think that it will do us any good for a total set of 22 individuals to be able to buy bread in a completely untraceable manner while the rest of the world population in sinking in Central Bank cash. Privacy is important, but adoption is more important.

Dec 16, 2022
Stack Sats, Not IOUs 🫡 #Bitcoin held on exchanges are often frozen, lost, or stolen. Learn how to hold bitcoin yourself. 1) Install Muun Wallet from app store. 2) Follow the backup process. 3) Click receive button. 4) Paste address shown into the withdraw page on exchange.

Introducing Bird SQL, a Twitter search interface that is powered by Perplexity’s structured search engine. It uses OpenAI Codex to translate natural language into SQL, giving everyone the ability to navigate large datasets like Twitter. http://perplexity.ai/sql

fiatjaf
@fiatjaf
·
Dec 15, 2022
Would be really nice to have a global content-addressed filesystem, but unfortunately that can't be IPFS because IPFS doesn't work. The overhead to find the stuff you need without an address is too huge, but it may work if we make a market for routes to files.
